dialogues.title: Completion
dialogues.message: Congratulations! You have completed the level

dialogues.title: Story
dialogues.message: Special Agent Nut enters the scene for the final stretch home.

dialogues.title: Story
dialogues.message: A sudden gust of icy wind howls through the trees.

dialogues.title: Story
dialogues.message: Agent Nut sees the once familiar path home is now buried beneath a blanket of snow.

dialogues.title: Story
dialogues.message: Agent Nut tightens his scarf and presses forward, each step heavier than the last.

dialogues.title: Story
dialogues.message: In the distance, a faint glow flickers between the trees… could it be shelter?

dialogues.title: Story
dialogues.message: Everything rests on this final stretch.
